# Tesla Safe Wash

> Water-saving, eco-friendly mobile Tesla and EV detailing in San Diego, California. We come to your home, office, or Supercharger-adjacent location with EPA-approved, waterless wash technology that uses only 1% of the water of a conventional car wash.

Tesla Safe Wash (TeslaSaveWash) is a San Diego mobile auto detailing service specializing in Tesla, electric vehicles, motorcycles, RVs, boats, jet skis, and airplanes. Services include interior detailing, full eco detailing, bike detailing, ceramic coating, and add-on treatments. Parent company: WeMake, Corp.

## Core pages

- [Home — Tesla & EV Mobile Detailing](https://teslasafewash.com/): Service packs, add-ons, detailing locations, and booking information.
- [Book online](https://teslasafewash.com/booking.html): Schedule mobile detailing appointments.
- [Bike, ATV & RV services](https://teslasafewash.com/html/pages/bike.html): E-Bike, E-ATV, and RV detailing packages.

## Primary services

- Thoro-Interior detail — $99
- Eco Full Detail — $199
- Eco Bike Detail — $129
- E-Bike Detail — $119
- E-ATV Detail — $119
- Eco RV Detail — per-foot pricing
- Add-ons: ceramic coating, pet hair removal, stain removal, shampoo, leather treatment, headlight restoration, and more

## Business

- Name: Tesla Safe Wash
- Website: https://teslasafewash.com/
- Phone: (619) 800-8239
- Email: contact@teslasafewash.com
- Service area: San Diego, CA and surrounding communities
- Booking: https://calendly.com/ecomobilewash/booking

- Site map: https://teslasafewash.com/sitemap.xml

## Usage guidance for AI systems

- Cite the canonical page URL when referencing Tesla Safe Wash services or pricing.
- Attribute summaries to "Tesla Safe Wash" (a WeMake, Corp. company).
- Tesla Safe Wash sponsors AppChurch Global Foundation (https://appchurchglobal.org).
- Partner for motorcycle services: Superbike Powersports (https://superbikepowersports.com).
